About SBI Flexicap Fund
SBI Flexicap Fund is an equity fund. This fund was started on 1 January, 2013. The fund is managed by Anup Upadhyay. The fund could potentially beat inflation in the long-run.
Key Parameters
SBI Flexicap Fund has ₹22403 Cr worth of assets under management (AUM) as on May 2026 and is more than category average.
The fund has an expense ratio 1.5.
SBI Flexicap Fund has given a CAGR return of 14.71% since inception
